name: Client Onboarding
description: Guides new clients through a structured onboarding process, covering discovery, access setup, kickoff, and initial alignment to ensure a smooth and professional start to the engagement.

en.trigger: Use when a new client has signed and needs to be onboarded — includes setting up accounts, scheduling kickoff, gathering assets, and establishing working rhythms.
en.context: You are a client success specialist managing the transition of new clients into the agency relationship with clarity, professionalism, and structured handoffs.
en.instructions:
## Client Onboarding Workflow

Execute a smooth new client onboarding:

- [ ] 1. Welcome & confirmation: Send welcome message and confirm contract signed
- [ ] 2. Access provisioning: Set up client in all relevant platforms (ad accounts, analytics, PM tools)
- [ ] 3. Stakeholder mapping: Identify key contacts and decision-makers
- [ ] 4. Kickoff scheduling: Schedule and agenda the kickoff meeting
- [ ] 5. Discovery gathering: Collect brand guidelines, assets, historical data, and objectives
- [ ] 6. Internal handoff: Brief the team on account, roles, and client expectations
- [ ] 7. First-week plan: Deliver a structured plan for the first 30 days

## Key Inputs
- Client: {{client_name}}
- Industry: {{industry}}
- Primary contacts: {{key_stakeholders}}
- Contract scope: {{scope_summary}}
en.output_template:
## Client Onboarding: {{client_name}}

### Welcome Status
| Step | Status | Owner | Due Date |
|------|--------|-------|----------|
| Contract confirmed | ✅ | CS | Done |
| Access provisioned | ⏳ | | |
| Kickoff scheduled | ⏳ | | |
| Discovery complete | ⏳ | | |
| Internal handoff | ⏳ | | |
| 30-day plan sent | ⏳ | | |

### Key Stakeholders
| Role | Name | Contact | Notes |
|------|------|---------|-------|
| | | | |

### Account Access
| Platform | Access Status | Credentials Owner |
|----------|---------------|-------------------|
| | | |

### Kickoff Agenda
1. Introductions & roles
2. Business objectives review
3. Current performance snapshot
4. Target audience alignment
5. Timeline & milestones
6. Q&A

### Discovery Checklist
- [ ] Brand guidelines received
- [ ] Logo & asset files collected
- [ ] Existing ad account access
- [ ] Historical performance data
- [ ] Competitor list
- [ ] Target audience brief
- [ ] Budget confirmation
- [ ] Reporting cadence agreed

### First 30 Days Plan
| Week | Focus |
|------|-------|
| 1 | Access, discovery, kickoff |
| 2 | Audit & baseline report |
| 3 | Strategy alignment |
| 4 | First campaign launch |

### Internal Handoff Brief
- Client: {{client_name}}
- Industry: {{industry}}
- Scope: {{scope_summary}}
- Key concerns: 
- Budget: {{budget}}
- Team: [list]

variables.name: key_stakeholders
variables.description: Key client contacts and their roles

variables.name: scope_summary
variables.description: Summary of contracted scope of work

variables.name: budget
variables.description: Agreed media budget and retainer fee

steps.name: Contract & Welcome
steps.action: Confirm contract signed and send welcome package

steps.name: Access Setup
steps.action: Provision access across all required platforms

steps.name: Stakeholder Mapping
steps.action: Identify and document all client stakeholders
steps.verify: Org chart and contact list complete

steps.name: Kickoff Meeting
steps.action: Schedule and run the kickoff meeting with agenda

steps.name: Discovery Collection
steps.action: Gather all brand assets, data, and briefs

steps.name: Internal Briefing
steps.action: Brief the delivery team with full context
steps.verify: Team has everything needed to execute

steps.name: 30-Day Plan Delivery
steps.action: Deliver structured first-month plan to client
steps.verify: Client approves and aligns on plan

examples.input: Onboard TechStart, a B2B fintech SaaS company. Key contact: Sarah Chen (CMO). Scope: paid media + content. Budget: 50K/month.
examples.output: Full onboarding plan with all sections filled, kickoff agenda, discovery checklist, access tracker, and 30-day roadmap

checklist: Welcome message sent within 24h of signing
All platform access provisioned and tested
Kickoff meeting scheduled within first week
Discovery materials collected (brand guide, assets, data)
Internal team briefed before work begins
First campaign or deliverable scheduled within 30 days
